messages.message: The 'daily' logical expression could make the dependencies of useMemo Hook (at line 36) change on every render. To fix this, wrap the initialization of 'daily' in its own useMemo() Hook.

messages.message: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'onComplete' and 'processEvent'. Either include them or remove the dependency array. If 'onComplete' changes too often, find the parent component that defines it and wrap that definition in useCallback.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [sessionId, apiBaseUrl, processEvent, onComplete]
